features: 【318LED Brighter & Wider Illuminate】Equiped with 318 High-Intensity LEDs, this outdoor solar lights deliver brighter light and wider coverage than standard solar lights, ensuring your driveway, garden, yard, fence, deck or patio stays fully illuminated all night

【Faster Charging & Longer Lighting】Upgraded solar panel with higher energy conversion up to 22%, charging 30% faster than conventional models—Enjoy longer illumination even with limited sunlight, perfect for reliable outdoor

【3 Lighting Modes】Mode1 (Medium Light Constant on Mode) Auto-on with 30% brightness at night, auto-off during the day. Mode2 (Dim-to-Bright Light Sensor Mode) 30% light when there is no movement, 100% brightness when detected. Mode3 (Off-to-Bright Light Sensor Mode) The light is off when there is no movement, 100% brightness when detected
【Ultra-Responsive PIR motion sensor】Instantly brightens your path with built-in advanced motion detection, when detected the movement—no more fumbling in the dark and keeping pets safe

【IP65 Waterproof & Durable】Crafted with a high-strength ABS shell and a top-notch solar panel, this weatherproof outside lights with sensor is designed to endure rain, wind, and snow, ensuring long-lasting performance for many years to come

【Easy to Install】With just 3 simple steps, you can have them set up in under 5 minutes. With no wiring required and require no maintenance,making motion sensor lights outdoor perfect for outside,walls and fences, deck,yard,stairs

【What You Get】Your satisfaction with every purchase is our top priority. we back that up with our commitment to customer support. If you encounter any issues with your outdoor sensor lights, our all-star customer service team is here to help
